notes: Verified the reused Bernoulli finite-design world, product-block covariance/factorization lemmas, Chebyshev/InProb/GaussianCDF pieces, and the DepGraph Stein CLT are type-fitting, at the right abstraction, and not sorry-backed; define-local bipartite/envelope/KKT pieces are justified as local scaffolding rather than missed clean reuse.
